instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that greets a user by name. When `userName` is present and non-blank, output a welcome heading with the escaped name. Otherwise output a generic sign-in prompt paragraph.
code:
<#-- Model: userName: string (optional) --> <#if userName?? && userName?trim?has_content>

Welcome, ${userName?html}!

<#else>

Please sign in to continue.
